title: Golden Cabbage Gratin
description: A creamy, comforting side dish made with tender cabbage and a crunchy golden crust.
instructions: In a large saucepan, sauté the sliced cabbage in the golden butter until softened.
In a separate saucepan, melt the Norwegian Gruyère cheese to create a creamy sauce.
Combine the cooked cabbage and cheese sauce in a baking dish.
Top the cabbage mixture with the grated Gruyère cheese and breadcrumbs.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cabbage is tender.
